description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian with a slender build, standing upright with both arms raised and extended diagonally upward. The individual is dressed in a sleeveless, fitted top and straight-cut pants, paired with closed-toe shoes. The figure's hair is medium-length and styled to fall just past the shoulders, with a center part. The facial features are neutral, and the body posture is rigid, with the arms forming a prominent V-shape above the head. The clothing fits closely to the body, and there are no visible accessories or carried items. The overall appearance suggests a casual, everyday urban pedestrian.
description: An adult pedestrian standing upright with arms raised in a V-shape, wearing a sleeveless top, pants, and closed shoes, with medium-length hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, sleeveless top, straight pants, and both arms raised diagonally upward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm's upward extension, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the top, pants, and the arms crossing behind the figure.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, arm extension, and the fit of the clothing from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top and straight-cut pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with both arms raised diagonally
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length straight hair with a center part
